transcript: Speaker A: English ki practice to aap kar lenge, lekin apna level kaise check karenge? SpeakX app par aap kisi doosre English learner ko challenge kar sakte hain. Aap dono ko ek-ek karke questions diye jayenge aur sahi jawab dene wala jeet jayega competition. Competition jeetne ke liye jab aap focus karenge, to aapki English ka level bahut jaldi behtar hota jayega. To aaj hi kisi ke saath English challenge kheliye aur uske liye SpeakX app download kar lijiye. [You will practice English, but how will you check your level? On the SpeakX app, you can challenge another English learner. Both of you will be given questions one by one, and the one who gives the correct answer will win the competition. When you focus on winning the competition, your English level will improve very quickly. So play an English challenge with someone today, and for that, download the SpeakX app.]
on_screen_text: English ki practice to aap kar lenge, lekin apna level kaise check karenge? SpeakX app par aap kisi doosre English learner ko challenge kar sakte hain. Aap dono ko ek-ek karke questions diye jayenge aur sahi jawab dene wala jeet jayega competition. competition jeetne ke liye jab aap focus karengye to aapki English kaa level bohot jaldi behtar hota jayegaa To aaj hi kisi ke saath English challenge kheliye aur uske liye SpeakX app Download kar lijiye. [You will practice English, but how will you check your level? On the SpeakX app, you can challenge another English learner. Both of you will be given questions one by one, and the one who gives the correct answer will win the competition. When you focus on winning the competition, your English level will improve very quickly. So play an English challenge with someone today, and for that, download the SpeakX app.]
summary: An AI avatar demonstrates the 'Play & Win' challenge feature of the SpeakX app, where users compete in real-time quizzes against other learners. This gamified approach helps users test and rapidly improve their English skills. The video ends with a call to action to download the SpeakX app.
